news_items.headline: Braves' Martín Pérez on injury list, DFA Carrasco
news_items.summary: The Braves placed left-hander Martín Pérez on the 15-day injured list on Monday with a left forearm contusion.

news_items.headline: Sources: Draft prospect Bumila has UCL injury
news_items.summary: Fireballing Massachusetts prep left-hander Brody Bumila shared an MRI with MLB teams on Monday that revealed damage to the ulnar collateral ligament in his left elbow, sources told ESPN.

news_items.headline: Dodgers C to debut despite tragedy in Venezuela
news_items.summary: The stepmom and sister of Dodgers catcher Eliezer Alfonzo Jr. were found dead as a result of the earthquakes in Venezuela last week.

news_items.headline: Marlins pull Pérez after 7 perfect innings vs. A's...
news_items.summary: Eury Pérez was pulled after pitching seven perfect innings Sunday, and the Marlins nearly blew an eight-run lead before holding on vs. the A's.

news_items.headline: White Sox's Murakami set to begin rehab stint
news_items.summary: White Sox rookie first baseman Munetaka Murakami will begin a rehab assignment Monday at Triple-A Charlotte, the slugger's final step before rejoining Chicago's lineup after being out with a right hamstring injury.

news_items.headline: Sanchez allows career-worst 9 ER in Phils' loss
news_items.summary: Philadelphia ace Cristopher Sanchez allowed a career-worst nine earned runs in just 3 1/3 innings in the Phillies' surprising 15-1 loss to Kansas City on Monday afternoon, telling reporters that the Royals "made me pay, and you just have to keep going."

news_items.headline: Suarez exits Red Sox win with adductor tightness
news_items.summary: Boston pitcher Ranger Suarez, a left-hander named to the American League All-Star team, left his start with two outs in the third inning Sunday due to left adductor tightness, but the Red Sox bullpen helped anchor a 7-5 win over the Los Angeles Angels.

news_items.headline: ⚾ Awards Watch: MVP, Cy Young and more
news_items.summary: With the All-Star break approaching, it's time to look at the leaders for MVP, Cy Young and more.

news_items.headline: Zac Veen named Pacific Coast League Player of the Month
news_items.summary: This is the outfielder’s first time to win the award.

news_items.headline: Cavalli begins 5-game suspension for role in Fenway Park incident
Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Milwaukee Brewers Monday
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals begin a brutal 5-game series over just 4 days against the Milwaukee Brewers Monday night at Busch Stadium. The Cardinals will give the ball to Dustin May while the Brewers will assign Shane Drohan the starting duties. First pitch is scheduled for 6:45pm central time and the game TV broadcast will […]

news_items.headline: Monday Bantering and Game Thread
news_items.summary: George Springer has joined the team in San Francisco, but there is no word that he’s been added to the roster and he isn’t in the lineup tonight, which is something that we could have an explanation about. Of course, as soon as I hit publish the team will make an announcement. The lineup they […]

news_items.headline: Minor League roundup, July 3-5: Parks Harber, homer machine
Braves news and notes: Walt Weiss defines Owen Murphy’s role, speaks on the farm system, Austin Riley
news_items.summary: The series finale between the Atlanta Braves and the New York Mets is about to start shortly and as usual, Walt Weiss spoke with the media ahead of the game and gave his thoughts on various hot On Owen Murphy “Good for him [earning a call-up],” began Weiss when talking about Owen Murphy. “He’s going […]

news_items.headline: The Red Sox are rapidly gaining traction in the race for the third Wild Card
news_items.summary: Boston’s only gained a pair of games on the third Wild Card during their recent hot streak, but they’ve gained a lot more in relation to the pack.
